_comment: THE STANDING MANIFEST — authoritative machine-readable config read by the stage scripts. 'series' = what to fetch from FRED; 'composite_anchor' + 'components' = what to display. 'description' = the plain-language 'what it is' line shown on the dashboard; 'group' buckets components in the explanation section. Directions: 'higher = more stress' or 'context'.

series.label: Chicago Fed National Financial Conditions Index
ICE BofA US High Yield OAS

composite_anchor.label: Chicago Fed NFCI (overall financial conditions)
composite_anchor.description: Composite of ~105 indicators of US financial conditions. 0 = average; positive = tighter (more stress) than average, negative = looser.

components.label: 10Y Term Premium
components.description: Extra yield investors demand to hold a 10-year bond rather than roll short-term debt — compensation for duration/rate risk.

components.label: SOFR - EFFR (funding spread)
components.description: Gap between secured (repo, SOFR) and unsecured (fed funds, EFFR) overnight borrowing. Spikes signal funding/plumbing stress.

components.label: HY credit OAS
components.description: Extra yield on US high-yield (junk) bonds over Treasuries. Widens when risk appetite drops.

components.label: IG credit OAS
components.description: Extra yield on US investment-grade corporate bonds over Treasuries.
